title: Gazpacho Oat Bites with Indian Flair
description: A Spanish-inspired dessert with an Indian twist, these oat bites are perfect for a sweet treat. The gazpacho adds a tangy flavor to the oats, creating a unique and delicious experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together oats, brown sugar, and desiccated coconut (if using).
Add in the chilled gazpacho and mix until the oats are well-coated.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
Place the balls onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with ghee or oil to prevent sticking.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly toasted.
Remove from oven and let cool completely on the baking sheet.
Store in an airtight container for up to 5 days.
